backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Icon, Connection, FreehandDrawing, Line, TextLabel, Image, DiagramState) and CRUD operations for diagrams and user profiles, with access control enforced via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three canvas features (image resizing, text resizing, and free-transform rotation) to their implementing files and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML template for the Vite/React app titled 'Threat Hunting Portal' that mounts the React app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet using html2canvas to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, and attack path pages, gating access behind Internet Identity authentication and showing a profile setup modal when no profile exists.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive SVG canvas component supporting multiple drawing tools (select, connect, pen, freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser, freeTransform, image) with full resize (8 handles) and rotation support for text labels and image elements.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG component that renders a directional arrow connector between two points on the attack path canvas, supporting rotation, selection state, and click handling.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders a labeled icon image for attack path diagram elements, mapping IconType strings to asset image paths and supporting drag behavior from the toolbar.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Sidebar toolbar for the attack path canvas that lists draggable icon types, drawing tool buttons (select, draw, text, etc.), and actions like undo/redo, save, load, and image upload.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Sidebar panel that lists all saved diagrams with metadata (icon/connection counts, last modified date) and supports loading or deleting them via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing the sticky header with navigation links, an optional hero banner on the home page, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Modal dialog that displays a scrollable list of saved diagrams with their metadata, allowing the user to load a selected diagram or delete one via a confirmation prompt.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that shows a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a login page for the Threat Hunt Portal that uses Internet Identity authentication, showing a loading state while authenticating.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A searchable combobox component for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, plus an input for adding custom technique strings, displaying all selections as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using a utility function, showing a spinner during generation and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it as their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, managing state for fields like title, author, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and other investigation details before submitting.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name before saving an attack path diagram, calling the provided onSave callback with the entered name.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Exports a static array of MITRE ATT&CK technique objects (id, name, description) covering categories such as Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for diagram elements (icons, connections, drawings, labels, images) and a custom React hook managing diagram state with undo/redo history and CRUD operations for all element types.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend, with custom loading/fetched state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by its bigint ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines stub React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get, save, delete) that return empty data or throw errors since the backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state to the backend and invalidates related diagram query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component for the attack path diagram editor, composing the canvas, toolbar, sidebar, and save/load dialogs while wiring diagram state management and backend persistence.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a threat hunt report creation form and submits the data via the useSaveReport mutation, navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single threat hunting report fetched by ID, showing sections like executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, and MITRE techniques, with a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: Renders a paginated table of all threat hunting reports with actions to view, download as PDF, or delete each report, handling loading and error states.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a styled PDF report by opening a new browser window with formatted HTML content derived from a DetailedReport object, then triggering the print dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using oklch variables, border radii, fonts, shadows, and animations for accordion and sidebar components.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app targeting ICP canisters, with path aliases, environment variable injection, a dev proxy to the local DFX replica, and global polyfill for esbuild.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Threat Hunting Portal project, including existing features (resizable images, resizable text boxes, rotation via Free Transform) and pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-3) with schema and architectural metadata.
